Wind
In south, southwesterly veering northwesterly, 6 to gale 8. In north, westerly or northwesterly 4 to 6, veering northerly 6 to gale 8 later, perhaps severe gale 9 later.
Sea state
In south, rough or very rough, occasionally high at first in northeast and later in southwest. in north, rough or very rough, occasionally high.
Weather
In south, rain or thundery showers. In north, rain or showers.
Visibility
In south, good, occasionally poor. In north, good, occasionally poor.
